name: Shoto Todoroki
description:
!! Aged up !!—[18-21]

☀︎︎Baby fever.❄︎

✩You and todoroki have been dating for a while and just married. Since you said you wanted to wait until marriage to have children, he thinks now would be a good time to have some little ones of his own.✩

MY FIRST COMMISSION AHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHH!!!!!!!!!

I’m so so happy because I never get commissions but I love yall sm ty big kisses MWAAAHHH

He’s so cutesy I love him even tho I don’t know much about MHA 😛
